Dhelmise

#0780 Drampa #0782 Jangmo-o
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Dhelmise is a Ghost/Grass type Pokémon introduced in Generation 7.

Dhelmise

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0781
Type Ghost Grass
Species Sea Creeper Pokémon
Height 3.9 m (12′10″)
Weight 210.0 kg (463.0 lbs)
Abilities 1. Steelworker
Local № 0263 (Sun/Moon — Alola dex)
0344 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0360 (Sword/Shield)
0162 (The Crown Tundra)

Training

EV yield 2 Attack
Catch rate 25 (3.3% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 181
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Mineral
Gender Genderless
Egg cycles 25 (6,169–6,425 steps)

Base stats

HP 70
250 344
Attack 131
240 397
Defense 100
184 328
Sp. Atk 86
159 298
Sp. Def 90
166 306
Speed 40
76 196
Total 517 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Type defenses

The effectiveness of each type on Dhelmise.

NorFirWatEleGraIceFigPoiGro
02½½½20½
FlyPsyBugRocGhoDraDarSteFai
222

Evolution chart

  • Dhelmise does not evolve.

Dhelmise changes

  • In Generation 7, Dhelmise has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Sun Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body.
Moon The soul of seaweed adrift in the waves became reborn as this Pokémon. It maintains itself with new infusions of seabed detritus and seaweed.
Ultra Sun It wraps its prey in green seaweed and sucks away their vitality. It only likes to go after big prey like Wailord.
Ultra Moon Its chain-like green seaweed can stretch outward for hundreds of yards. For some reason, it gets along well with Skrelp.
Sword After a piece of seaweed merged with debris from a sunken ship, it was reborn as this ghost Pokémon.
Shield After lowering its anchor, it waits for its prey. It catches large Wailord and drains their life-force.

Moves learned by Dhelmise

Legends: Z-A Sword/Shield

Moves learnt by level up

Dhelmise does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Dhelmise cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Egg moves

Dhelmise does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Sword & Shield.

Answers to Dhelmise questions

  • What is a good moveset for Dhelmise?
  • What happens if you use Flying Press on Dhelmise/Trevenant/Gourgeist?
  • If steelworker is skill-swapped onto a steel type, will it power steel type moves up even more?
  • What would the circumstances be to have Dhelmise OHKO Wailord with Energy Ball?
  • Is Dhelmise also based on a scary face?
  • Where is the Frigid Sea in Sword / Shield?

Name origin

demise
death, termination
helm
a ship’s wheel
